name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 20 Oct 2023
body: [{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW:","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In this launch, we are introducing a revamped layout of our Mobile App profile section."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more about this feature, kindly read ahead!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"ENHANCEMENT:","bold":true}]},{"type":"h4","children":[{"text":"A Dedicated Feature","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can now view your Mobile App SDKs from a single place known as the "},{"text":"Mobile Profile,","bold":true},{"text":" present in the "},{"text":"Settings","bold":true},{"text":" section of your Maropost Marketing Cloud account. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/mobapp6.0685g00000HgysjAAB.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/mobapp6.0685g00000HgysjAAB.png","name":"mobapp6","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1045,"width":2880}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"","bold":true}]},{"type":"h4","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"Cleaner UI and a Simplistic flow"}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The user interface has been updated, making the existing flow more understandable. Furthermore, the Mobile SDK page has a fresh look to it, making it easier for developers and users to understand the current versions and platforms on which the mobile apps are operating. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/mobapp7.0685g00000HgysyAAB.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/mobapp7.0685g00000HgysyAAB.png","name":"mobapp7","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1461,"width":2880}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"﻿To know more about Mobile SDKs and how to manage them, kindly read our "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Mobile-App-Profiles","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Mobile App Profiles","bold":true}]},{"text":" page."}]}]}]
